pi_items.source: setup_task.sh Python ORM injection logic and verifier.py logic
setup_task.sh Python ORM injection logic and verifier.py logic
Derived from deleting 1 of the 3 initially created routines

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated workout routines injected directly into the wger database via Django ORM in setup_task.sh. The verified initial state contains exactly 3 routines: 'Push-Pull-Legs', '5x5 Beginner', and 'Upper-Lower Split'. The task correctly requires the deletion of the '5x5 Beginner' routine while keeping the other two ('Push-Pull-Legs' and 'Upper-Lower Split') preserved, resulting in an expected final count of 2 routines.
